intro.line2: Two years of laughter, hugs, and love

login.title: Just for us
login.subtitle: The word only we know
login.hint: Hint: a date we'll never forget

profiles.title: Who's watching?
profiles.taglineHer: The leading lady of this story
profiles.taglineHim: The one who loves you every day

finale.title: Happy anniversary
finale.line1: Thank you for these two years
finale.line2: You are my home, my peace, and my joy
finale.line3: I love you today and always

e01.title: The first hello
e01.body: The day the universe conspired for us to meet.

e02.title: Our first date
e02.body: Nerves, smiles, and the feeling that something special was beginning.

e03.title: First I love you
e03.body: Words that changed everything, spoken with hearts in hand.

e04.title: April 18th
e04.body: The date that sealed our official beginning. Our day.

e06.title: Laughing until late
e06.body: Nights of talk, memes, and hugs that heal everything.

e07.title: Weathering storms
e07.body: We learned that together we're stronger than any obstacle.

e08.title: Our home
e08.body: It's not a place: it's you, by my side.

e09.title: One year together
e09.body: 365 days of love. The first great chapter.

e10.title: Dreams as a team
e10.body: Plans, goals, and a future we build together.

e11.title: Little rituals
e11.body: Coffee, shows, walks: the ordinary made eternal.

e12.title: Today — 2 years
e12.body: 730 days of you and me. And this is only the beginning, gordita.

c01.title: Chapter I — The meeting
c01.body: Every great love starts with a moment that seems random, but destiny planned it.

c02.title: Chapter II — Building
c02.body: Day by day, brick by brick, we built something no storm can tear down.

c03.title: Chapter III — Forever
c03.body: I don't promise perfect days, but real, present, true love.

letterBody.p1: My love, my gordita, my favorite person in this world:
letterBody.p2: Writing these lines is trying to capture in words something only the heart understands. Two years by your side have been the greatest gift of my life.
letterBody.p3: Thank you for your patience, your laugh, your tenderness, and for choosing me every day. With you I learned that love isn't perfect: it's real, constant, it's us.
letterBody.p4: May this little digital universe be only a shadow of what I feel for you. To many more years together, always.
